chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-2188 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of main case 20-02-2024 Petitioner present in person Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Sawan Khan Jagirani Advocate has filed power and comments on behalf of respondents No.4 and 5 stated that water to the petitioner’s land for irrigation purpose has been supplied, which petitioner has confirmed. Learned counsel further undertakes that as per current share list water would be provided to petitioner’s land. However, if ever share list is revised, a due notice would be given to all the shareholders including the petitioner as per codal formalities. Petitioner is satisfied, accordingly the petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
